meta.label: Parallel Web Search
meta.description: Search the web using Parallel's intelligent search API with excerpts

params.name: api_auth
params.label: Parallel API Auth Preset
params.description: Select a preset from the 'parallel-api-key' parameter set

params.name: mode
params.label: Search Mode
params.description: Search mode: 'one-shot' for comprehensive results, 'agentic' for multi-step workflows (recommended for agents), or 'fast' for low latency

params.name: max_results
params.label: Max Results
params.description: Maximum number of search results to return (1-20)

params.name: max_chars_per_excerpt
params.label: Max Characters Per Excerpt
params.description: Maximum characters per excerpt from each result (100-10000)
